prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/327-deck.key in Keynote (which starts with one slide). Add a new slide (Slide menu > New Slide, or Cmd+Shift+N). Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'keynote add_slide ~/Desktop/kinbench/327-deck.key'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/327-slide-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
